extractions.problem: Plants used for medical purposes, chemotherapeutic drug identification from natural products
extractions.method: Cell viability assays, combination index analysis
extractions.finding: Evaluated anti-cancer activity of plant-derived compounds

extractions.problem: Genomic characterization of breast cancer cell lines and PDX models
extractions.method: Deep whole genome sequencing using Illumina X10
extractions.finding: Identified novel genomic alterations in commonly used models

extractions.problem: Computational modeling of biological systems across scales
extractions.finding: Comprehensive ME-model integrating metabolism and macromolecular synthesis for E. coli

extractions.problem: Single-cell epigenomics methods establishment for understanding heterogeneity
extractions.method: Low-input and single-cell whole genome bisulfite sequencing

extractions.problem: Microfluidic devices for drug carrier development and screening
extractions.finding: Developments in microfluidic devices for drug delivery and screening

extractions.problem: Accurate detection of subclonal mutations in heterogeneous tumors
extractions.method: MuSE somatic mutation caller using NGS data
extractions.finding: Two-step approach for subclonal mutation detection

extractions.problem: Mechanistic models computational demands require ML surrogates
extractions.method: ML surrogate models for biological process emulation
extractions.finding: Growing evidence ML surrogates emulate mechanistic models effectively

extractions.problem: Identifying peptide toxin blocking stretch-activated ion channels
extractions.method: Electrophysiology and toxin isolation from spider venom
extractions.finding: GsMTx-4 toxin blocks cationic stretch-activated channels

extractions.problem: Pharmacokinetics of voxelotor in sickle cell disease patients
extractions.finding: Characterized PK of voxelotor in SCD patients

extractions.problem: ABA-induced stomatal closure mechanism in plants
